top_signals.title: Czech Premier Urges Interest Rate Cut as Inflation Risks Grow
top_signals.summary: The Czech Republic’s prime minister urged the central bank to cut interest rates, doubling down on his push for lower borrowing costs even as the country faces growing inflation risks from energy prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Satoshi-era bitcoin whale moves over $200 million in BTC to FalconX, Cumberland: Onchain Lens
top_signals.summary: A bitcoin OG transferred about 2,650 BTC to the crypto trading firms through multiple transactions on Sunday, according to Onchain Lens.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Italy disrupts CINEMAGOAL piracy app that stole streaming auth codes
top_signals.summary: Italian authorities have dismantled a piracy ecosystem centered around the CINEMAGOAL app that provided access to various streaming platforms, including Netflix, Disney+, and Spotify. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
